hsa04935.name: Growth hormone synthesis, secretion and action

kegg_bridging.strongest_shared_pathway: hsa04519 (Cadherin signaling): YAP1, TAZ, FAK, ROCK1, RHOA all co-map with EP300
kegg_bridging.notable_gaps: PIEZO1, KDM6B, BRD4, CTCF have no KEGG pathway annotations — these are less well-characterized in canonical pathways

string_interactions.note: YAP1 recruits EP300/CBP acetyltransferase to target gene enhancers; this score reflects documented co-regulation
YAP1-BRD4 co-occupy super-enhancers; consistent with emerging literature on mechanosensitive super-enhancers
No direct STRING interaction; PIEZO1 top partners are ion channels and DNA replication proteins (ATR, CHEK2). Connection to DOT1L/H3K79me2 is likely indirect via calcium signaling cascade
Low STRING score; however LMNA-CTCF interaction is 0.654 and LMNA-HDAC2 is 0.690, suggesting lamin interaction with chromatin remodelers is real but HDAC3 specifically is not the primary partner
Low direct STRING score; FAK-EP300 connection is likely indirect through RHOA/ROCK1 pathway
Additional check: LMNA-CTCF interaction supports nuclear mechanics → 3D genome topology bridge
Additional: LMNA-HDAC2 supports lamin-chromatin remodeling axis even though HDAC3 score is low

mechanotransduction_AND_enhancer.note: High co-occurrence; 'enhancer' may include non-genomic enhancers. Field is active.

ECM_stiffness_AND_chromatin_accessibilit.note: Very low — confirms this is a nascent connection with few studies

YAP_AND_super_enhancer.note: Emerging area; 14 papers suggests early-stage research, not yet saturated

matrix_stiffness_AND_H3K27ac.note: Near-zero co-occurrence — confirms the specific ECM stiffness → H3K27ac enhancer connection is almost unexplored. Critical novelty signal.

integrin_AND_chromatin_remodeling_AND_ep.note: Some literature exists but field is not saturated

nuclear_mechanics_AND_genomic_enhancer.note: General term; most papers are about nuclear structure not genomic enhancers specifically

nuclear_mechanics_AND_H3K27ac.note: Very sparse — nuclear mechanics specifically linked to H3K27ac is nearly unstudied

mechanotransduction_AND_H3K27ac.note: Near-zero: mechanotransduction → H3K27ac enhancer mark is almost unexplored

ecm_force_estimate_pN.assumptions: 20 vs 4 focal adhesions (stiff vs soft), 30% LINC transmission, 10 vs 2 actomyosin stress fibers at 1 nN each, 10% transmission to nucleus

nuclear_deformation_passive_only.note: Passive LINC transmission alone gives sub-percent nuclear strain; literature 10-30% volume change requires active actomyosin contractility (ROCK1-dependent)

physics_check.notes: ECM stiffness difference generates 120-920 pN differential force at the nucleus (passive + active mechanisms), far exceeding the 5 pN threshold for chromatin domain stretching (Sun 2020). Active ROCK1-myosin IIA (MYH9) contractility amplifies the passive LINC force ~7x. Both routes are quantitatively sufficient to deform chromatin loops in the 0.5-2 um size range.

mechanotransduction_to_chromatin.evidence: KEGG: PTK2/FAK+ROCK1+RHOA share TGF-beta and Cadherin pathways with EP300. STRING: YAP1-EP300 (0.692). PubMed: 2142 co-occurrence papers. Multiple literature-verified mechanisms (HDAC3, KDM6B, DOT1L documented in lit scout).
mechanotransduction_to_chromatin.key_gap: ECM stiffness gradients specifically have not been profiled genome-wide for enhancers

nuclear_mechanics_to_3D_genome.evidence: STRING: LMNA-CTCF (0.654), LMNA-EMD (0.999), LMNA-SUN2 (0.999). Force physics: 120-920 pN >> 5 pN threshold. LAP2beta paper (PMID 34700042) directly shows force-chromatin domain stretching.
nuclear_mechanics_to_3D_genome.key_gap: Hi-C under ECM stiffness gradients has not been performed; CTCF loop extrusion under mechanical load unstudied

YAP_TAZ_to_enhancer.evidence: STRING: YAP1-EP300 (0.692), YAP1-BRD4 (0.691). KEGG: YAP1/TAZ co-occur with EP300 in hsa04519. PubMed: YAP+super-enhancer = 14 papers (emerging). YAP1 interacts with TEAD factors which bind enhancers.
YAP_TAZ_to_enhancer.key_gap: Direct ChIP-seq of H3K27ac under ECM stiffness (not shear) for YAP target enhancers not done

integrin_to_histone_marks.evidence: PMID 32270037: integrin force → H3K9me3 demethylation (direct experimental evidence). KEGG: ITGB1 shares pathways with FAK (hsa04517, hsa04518). PubMed: 17 papers on integrin+chromatin remodeling+epigenetic.
integrin_to_histone_marks.key_gap: H3K27ac (activating enhancer mark) specifically downstream of integrin force is not well-characterized

ECM_stiffness_to_super_enhancer.evidence: PubMed: matrix stiffness + H3K27ac = 1 paper (near-disjoint). YAP1-BRD4 STRING 0.691 (BRD4 is the canonical super-enhancer reader). Physics PLAUSIBLE. No direct experimental evidence of super-enhancer formation under stiffness gradients.
ECM_stiffness_to_super_enhancer.key_gap: This is the most novel and least evidenced connection — only 1 paper links matrix stiffness to H3K27ac. Highly novel target for Generator.

overall_bridge_verdict_rationale: 4/5 bridge concepts have PARTIAL-to-VERIFIED STRING interaction support or direct KEGG pathway overlap. Physics check strongly PLAUSIBLE (920 pN vs 5 pN threshold). The ECM stiffness → super-enhancer link is the most speculative but mechanistically coherent. PubMed near-zero counts for ECM stiffness + H3K27ac confirm novelty.
key_quantitative_constraints: ECM stiffness delta force at nucleus: 120 pN (passive) to 920 pN (active+passive) — 24-184x above 5 pN chromatin stretch threshold
YAP1-EP300 STRING score: 0.692 (medium-high; supports YAP1 as enhancer activator via H3K27ac deposition)
YAP1-BRD4 STRING score: 0.691 (medium-high; supports YAP-super-enhancer connection)
LMNA-CTCF STRING score: 0.654 (supports nuclear mechanics → 3D genome topology)
PIEZO1-DOT1L: NO direct interaction in STRING; connection must be indirect (Ca2+/CaM signaling cascade)
LMNA-HDAC3 STRING score: 0.187 (low; LMNA-HDAC2 is 0.690 — use HDAC2, not HDAC3, for LMNA mechanistic claims)
KEGG overlap: 9 shared pathways, strongest = hsa04519 Cadherin signaling (5 Field A genes + EP300)
PubMed: matrix stiffness + H3K27ac = 1 paper (near-disjoint — maximum novelty for enhancer-stiffness connection)
PubMed: YAP + super-enhancer = 14 papers (early-stage, not saturated)
Nuclear deformation: passive LINC alone insufficient (<0.3% strain); active ROCK1-actomyosin required for observed 10-30% volume change
generator_warnings: Do NOT claim PIEZO1 directly interacts with DOT1L — STRING shows no interaction. The pathway is PIEZO1 → Ca2+ influx → CaM kinase → DOT1L activation
Do NOT claim LMNA-HDAC3 as a strong interaction — STRING score is 0.187. Use HDAC2 or the broader lamin-HDAC axis
Nuclear deformation claims must invoke ACTIVE actomyosin contractility (ROCK1-MYH9), not just passive force transmission through LINC, to reach the 10-30% volume changes in literature
ECM stiffness → super-enhancer is the most novel claim (1 paper): frame as a novel untested hypothesis, not established biology
